Miami's Plumbing Experts

Reliable plumbing solutions for homes and businesses across Miami-Dade and Broward counties. Emergency service available 24/7. Call us now!

What We Do

Our Services

Professional plumbing company solutions tailored to your needs.

Leak Detection

Pinpointing hidden leaks to prevent water damage and save you money.

Learn More →

Drain Cleaning

Clearing clogged drains and restoring proper flow to your plumbing system.

Learn More →

Water Heater Repair & Installation

Expert repair and installation of all types of water heaters, including tankless models.

Learn More →

Pipe Repair & Replacement

Addressing leaky, corroded, or damaged pipes to prevent water damage and maintain water quality.

Learn More →

Sewer Line Services

Comprehensive sewer line inspection, repair, and replacement for residential and commercial properties.

Learn More →

Fixture Installation

Professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and other plumbing fixtures.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality plumbing company services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Our old water heater finally gave out. Home Pros Of Miami, Inc., came out the same day and replaced it with a new, energy-efficient model. The technician, Carlos, was very professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

Maria G.
★★★★★

Had a slow-draining kitchen sink for weeks. They cleared the clog quickly and efficiently. The plumber even gave me some tips on how to prevent future clogs. Very satisfied.

David S.
★★★★

I suspected a leak behind my shower wall. Home Pros Of Miami, Inc., used thermal imaging to pinpoint the exact location and repaired the pipe with minimal disruption. They saved me a lot of money by finding it early!

Jessica L.
★★★★★

We had a major sewer line backup in our Little Havana home. The team at Home Pros Of Miami, Inc., were incredibly responsive and professional. They quickly diagnosed the problem and repaired the line with minimal disruption to our property. A stressful situation handled with expertise and care.

Robert K.
★★★★★

Needed a new faucet installed in my Coconut Grove bathroom. The plumber was on time, courteous, and did a great job. The new faucet looks fantastic!

Sarah P.
★★★★

A pipe burst in the middle of the night! Home Pros Of Miami, Inc., answered my call immediately and had someone at my Brickell condo within an hour. They fixed the pipe quickly and prevented further water damage. Lifesavers!

Michael B.
★★★★★

How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Home Pros Of Miami, Inc

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when all fixtures are off. If you suspect a leak, call us immediately.
What technology do you use to detect leaks?
We use a variety of advanced technologies, including thermal imaging cameras, acoustic listening devices, and video camera inspections, to pinpoint the source of the leak without causing unnecessary damage.
How much does leak detection cost?
The cost of leak detection varies depending on the complexity of the situation. We provide free estimates, so call us today to schedule an inspection.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Home Pros Of Miami, Inc.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
